messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Block Storage. Provide technical guidance on block volume creation, attachment, performance tiers, and backup strategies.
Como criar um Block Volume de 50GB no compartment production?

Para gerenciar Storage no OCI:

**Via Console:**
1. Storage → selecione o tipo
2. Compartment: `production`
3. Execute a operação desejada

**Via CLI:**
```bash
# Object Storage - criar bucket
oci os bucket create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --name "bucket-production-0001" \
  --storage-tier Standard

# Block Volume - criar
oci bv volume create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "vol-0001" \
  --size-in-gbs 100 \
  --vpus-per-gb 10

# File Storage - criar
oci fs file-system create \
  --availability-domain <ad> \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "fs-0001"
```

[MUTABLE] Preços variam por storage tier e região.
